labels.OBUIAPP_UpgradeEndDesc:
The upgrade to Etendo (from OB 2.50) has been completed successfully.

Next steps:
  • Read the release notes
  • In case your previous instance used a customized field layout, it is recommended to review the new layout and modify it if needed. Learn how to do it.
  • Some special customizations could prevent Etendo elements (windows, pop-ups and so on) to be shown in the new user interface. Learn more how to detect and fix those cases.
  • Test your business processes before deploying release into a production environment
